summary: V5 Car & Driver feature testing complete. All new features working correctly. Home page Car & Driver section renders with eyebrow, headline, 4 pillar cards, 3 pricing tiers, 'See full details' link, and WhatsApp button. /car-and-driver full page renders with cinematic hero (Ken Burns animation), 4 pillars, 3 vehicle tier cards with enquire buttons, 8-item included list, 6-card concierge grid, 3 sample routes with CTAs, 5-item FAQ accordion, and bottom CTA. Navbar has Car & Driver link in both desktop and mobile views. Language translations work correctly (DE: 'Auto & Fahrer', FR: 'Voiture & Chauffeur'). Footer also shows translated Car & Driver link. All V1-V4 regressions verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5 features fully tested: (1) Home page Car & Driver section (data-testid='car-and-driver-section') between WhyBookDirect and Experiences with eyebrow, headline, hero image, 4 pillar cards, 3 pricing tier previews (data-testid='car-tier-preview-sedan/suv/van'), 'See full details' link (data-testid='car-and-driver-learn-more'), WhatsApp button (data-testid='car-and-driver-whatsapp'). (2) /car-and-driver full page (data-testid='car-and-driver-page') with hero, back link (data-testid='car-page-back'), hero WhatsApp CTA (data-testid='car-hero-whatsapp'), vehicle tiers (data-testid='vehicle-tier-sedan/suv/van'), enquire buttons (data-testid='vehicle-enquire-sedan/suv/van'), concierge grid (data-testid='concierge-grid'), sample routes (data-testid='sample-route-0..2'), FAQ accordion (data-testid='car-faq-accordion'), bottom CTA (data-testid='car-bottom-whatsapp'). (3) Navbar Car & Driver link (data-testid='nav-link-car-&-driver') in desktop and mobile, translates to DE/FR. (4) Footer Car & Driver link also translates. (5) Hash links (/#why-us, /#packages, /#experiences) work from both home and detail pages. All V1-V4 features verified: deposit page, admin dashboard, package detail itinerary accordion.
